title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Anna University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Anna University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Anna University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Anna University:
Anna University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University!
